programs.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programs.desc: Freddy and Juan get an SOS from a group of young miners in Montana after they go $1M into debt with no gold to show for it; facing nonstop breakdowns and a crew mutiny, the guys must resurrect a 60-year-old conveyor and divide forces to save this plant.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: When neighbors send a plea for help, the Raneys rush to rescue a lone Montana homesteader; with winter bearing down upon them, they must build a survival strategy from scratch to secure shelter, water and food before it's too late.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.sub_title: Raney Returns: Back to Black Hills
programs.desc: The Black family thrived after their rescue three years ago, but success has brought with it new, overwhelming issues; Marty returns to the Black Hills to help them battle the elements as they rebuild to protect against inclement weather.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: The Raneys mark the milestone of 100 rescues with a look back at their most unforgettable homesteads. From wild transformations to fan-favorite families, they revisit it all, even answering viewers' most-asked social media questions.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: A Colorado family's dream of self-sufficiency is crumbling under the destructiveness of their bison herd; to supply the ranch with food and water, the Raneys must first tame the chaos and build a path to true self-sustainability.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground; Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse; Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.
